sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22006" key="gerousia/rxhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γερουσι-άρχης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n22006.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">president of Jewish elders</tr_>, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9902</biblScope> </bibl> (<placeName TEIform="placeName">Rome</placeName>).</sense> </entryFree>
